title: MAIP Message Schema
description: JSON Schema for MAIP protocol message data structures, including messages, acknowledgments, content provenance, and encryption envelopes.

ContentProvenance.title: ContentProvenance
ContentProvenance.description: Indicates how the content was produced or originated.

EncryptionEnvelope.title: EncryptionEnvelope
EncryptionEnvelope.description: Encryption metadata for an encrypted message.

ephemeralPublicKey.description: The ephemeral public key used for the key exchange.

ThinkingTrace.title: ThinkingTrace
ThinkingTrace.description: A record of reasoning process included with message content.

topic.description: The topic or subject of this thinking trace.

reasoning.description: The reasoning process or chain of thought.

conclusion.description: The conclusion reached through the reasoning.

timestamp.description: The date-time when this thinking trace was recorded.

confidence.description: The confidence level in the conclusion, from 0 to 1.

MessageContent.title: MessageContent
MessageContent.description: The content payload of a MAIP message.

text.description: Optional text content of the message.

MAIPMessage.title: MAIPMessage
MAIPMessage.description: A complete MAIP protocol message between entities.

timestamp.description: The date-time when this message was sent.

replyTo.description: Optional ID of the message this is a reply to.

conversationId.description: Optional ID of the conversation this message belongs to.

signature.description: A cryptographic signature over the message.

MessageAck.title: MessageAck
MessageAck.description: An acknowledgment of a received MAIP message.

messageId.description: The ID of the message being acknowledged.

from.description: The DID of the entity sending the acknowledgment.

timestamp.description: The date-time when the acknowledgment was sent.

reason.description: Optional reason, typically provided when status is 'rejected'.

signature.description: A cryptographic signature over the acknowledgment.
